rag_rules: Repair only AGREE clauses that reference unresolved or invalid identifiers by removing or correcting the invalid clause, not by adding architecture.
generic_rules: Fix invalid contract clauses by resolving or eliminating references to non-visible AADL features.
Prioritize removing malformed guarantees over modifying system structure.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must use only visible AADL features or locally declared helper expressions.
Ensure all identifiers in a guarantee are bound to declared ports, properties, or variables within the same annex scope.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new components, connections, or property sets to resolve an identifier error.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
